query_normalized: memslides: a hierarchical memory driven agent framework for personalized slide generation with multi-turn local revision linguistics
rationale: The paper studies the same core mechanism—memory usage in multi‑turn interactions of generative models—though applied to text‑to‑image generation rather than slide creation. This provides relevant evidence on hierarchical/multi‑turn memory dynamics (criterion a) and can serve as a baseline reference for memory‑driven agent behavior in the user's domain.
